title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSE - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSE - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
